rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI-level reference match (reference_index 3) with no in-text citation context or reference text, so substantive use cannot be verified. The citing paper is a game-theoretic model of strategic opinion expression in group decisions, while the cited paper is a duopoly conspicuous-goods pricing model with snob/conformist demand, indicating possible but not clearly central conceptual overlap in social effects. Given sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only, but also not strong enough to clearly keep.
